entry.note: <L>54094<pc>5-0200<k1>BadreSvara<k2>BadreSvara {#BadreSvara#}¦ ({#Badra + I˚#}) <lex>m.</lex> <div n="1"> 1) Bez. verschiedener Statuen und <is>Liṅga</is> des <is>Śiva</is> <ls>ŚKDR.</ls> nach den <ls>PURĀṆA.</ls> <div n="1">— 2) N. pr. einer Oertlichkeit <ls>Verz. d. Oxf. H. 39,b,3.</ls> <div n="1">— 3) N. pr. eines <is>Kāyastha</is> <ls>RĀJA-TAR. 7,38.</ls> <ls n="RĀJA-TAR. 7,">44. fg.</ls> <ls n="RĀJA-TAR. 7,">106.</ls> <ls n="RĀJA-TAR. 7,">121.</ls> <LEND>

<L>78802<pc>4-250-a<k1>BadreSvara<k2>BadreSvara {#BadreSvara#}¦ <lex>m.</lex> <ab>N. pr.</ab> <div n="1">— 1〉 verschiedener Statuen und <is>Liṅga</is> des <is>Śiva</is>. <div n="1">— 2〉 einer Oertlichkeit. <div n="1">— 3〉 eines <is>Kāyastha</is>. <LEND>
